title: parse_send_response: no test for exactly-65-char txid
description: parse_send_response is tested for 63-char (too short) and 64-char (valid) txids, but not for 65-char (one too long). The len() != 64 check catches both cases but the 65-char boundary case is not exercised. This is a minor coverage gap on the rejection path — the existing 63-char test proves the lower bound, but the upper bound is untested. Add a test with 65 valid hex chars to confirm it returns InvalidTxId.
close_reason: P3/P4 deferred: below stopping threshold (P0=0, P1=0, SEC7 says STOP)
